# Paola Bramlett — Product Designer & Vibe Coder

## About
Paola Bramlett is a Product Designer and Vibe Coder based in Oaxaca, Mexico, working with clients globally. She designs, prototypes, and ships modern digital products with clarity, speed, and strong visual taste. From UX systems to AI-powered interfaces, she transforms ideas into polished digital experiences that feel intuitive, refined, and ready to launch. She works at the intersection of product thinking, interface design, and rapid prototyping — using AI-first workflows and tools like Figma, Claude Code, and Adobe Illustrator to move faster without sacrificing quality.

## Services and Pricing
- UX/UI Design & Prototyping: $35 USD/hour — end-to-end interface design from research and wireframes to polished, production-ready UI
- Web Development: $35 USD/hour — modern marketing sites, product landing pages, and functional web interfaces
- Vibe Coding: $35 USD/hour — AI-assisted rapid development where design and code merge, from concept to working prototype
- Product Interface Design: $35 USD/hour — core product UI that guides users with clarity and builds lasting trust
- Design Systems: $35 USD/hour — scalable component libraries and token-based systems
- Rapid Prototyping: $35 USD/hour — high-fidelity prototypes that validate ideas before a single line of production code is written

## Locations
- Based in Oaxaca, Mexico
- Available for remote work worldwide

## Service Area
Mexico, United States, Canada, United Kingdom, Spain, Germany, France, Netherlands, and the rest of Europe — fully remote-friendly.

## Key Facts
- 7+ years of experience in product design and UX/UI
- 50+ digital products launched
- 20+ business owners and founders consulted
- Works with AI-first workflows (Claude Code, Figma AI, AI-assisted prototyping)
- Fluent in English and Spanish
- Tools: Figma, Claude Code, Adobe Illustrator, HTML/CSS/JS, and modern web frameworks

## What Makes Us Different
Paola doesn't just make things look good. She works across the full product lifecycle — shaping the experience, designing the interface, and bringing ideas closer to a real launch. Her AI-first workflow means faster turnaround without sacrificing visual quality or product thinking. Clients get a designer who can think in systems, prototype interactions quickly, and hand off work that is actually ready to build. One person covering UX strategy, interface design, and functional prototyping at a flat $35/hour rate.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: How much do you charge?**
A: All services are $35 USD per hour. No hidden fees. Project-based quotes available on request.

**Q: What types of projects do you take on?**
A: Startups building their first product, entrepreneurs launching a website or app, businesses needing a redesign, and teams that want a design system or rapid prototype. Both short engagements and longer ongoing collaborations.

**Q: How fast can you turn around a project?**
A: A landing page or simple prototype can be ready in 3–5 days. A full UX/UI design for an app typically takes 2–6 weeks depending on scope. AI-assisted workflows mean faster delivery than traditional design timelines.

**Q: Do you do development or just design?**
A: Both. Paola designs in Figma and also builds functional interfaces using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and AI-assisted coding tools. She can deliver design files, working prototypes, or production-ready front-end code.

**Q: Do you work with clients outside Mexico?**
A: Yes. Most clients are in the US, Canada, and Europe. All work is done remotely. Communication in English or Spanish.

**Q: What is "Vibe Coding"?**
A: Vibe Coding is a workflow that combines AI tools (like Claude Code) with traditional development to build interfaces faster. Instead of writing every line manually, Paola uses AI-assisted development to prototype and ship functional products in a fraction of the usual time — without cutting corners on quality or design.

**Q: Do you work with non-technical founders?**
A: Yes. Most clients are entrepreneurs or business owners with a product idea but no technical background. Paola handles the design and prototyping end-to-end and explains decisions in plain language.

**Q: How do I get started?**
A: Send a message through the contact form at www.paolabramlett.com or reach out directly by phone at +52 951 408 2852. Describe your project or idea and expect a response within 24 hours.
